dependencies: Reliance on third-party service providers for certain aspects of business including technology platforms and cloud-based services
Dependence on prime brokers, custodians, counterparties, administrators and other agents for fund operations
Reliance on third-party distributors for private wealth products distribution
risks: Third-party service provider failures could disrupt business operations
Concentration of transaction volume with limited number of counterparties
Third-party distributors may sell competing proprietary investment products
Operational risks from third-party service providers
Cybersecurity threats to third-party service providers
Counterparty default risk with prime brokers and custodians
